title: AI Agents Do Not Fail Alone:The Context Fails First
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.14275v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Context engineering has become central to building reliable AI agents, yet it remains largely unmeasured. Agents do not fail in isolation: their behavior is shaped by the instructions, tools, memory, retrieved knowledge, guardrails, and untrusted inputs accumulated in their context. When this context is weak, agents drift, hallucinate, misuse tools, ignore constraints, become vulnerable to injection, and waste tokens. This paper validates context-engineering quality as an independent leading indicator of agent reliability. We implement the measurement in ProofAgent-Harness, an open-source infrastructure for AI agent evaluation that uses multi-juror, consensus-based scoring. The harness assesses context across seven criteria: role clarity, guardrail coverage, instruction consistency, tool schema quality, grounding sufficiency, injection hardening, and token efficiency. Crucially, the context score is isolated from behavioral metrics and r
reason_zh: 提出“上下文先失败”观点，系统分析Agent失败根源，为构建可靠Agent提供可测量框架，极具实践价值。
summary_zh: 本文指出AI Agent的失败并非孤立发生，而是由上下文（指令、工具、记忆、检索知识、护栏、不可信输入）的薄弱导致。当上下文脆弱时，Agent会出现漂移、幻觉、工具误用等问题。作者提出上下文工程是构建可靠Agent的核心，但目前缺乏度量方法。论文系统分析了上下文各组件对Agent行为的影响，并提出了一个可测量的框架，为Agent可靠性工程提供了新方向。
title_zh: AI Agent并非孤立失败：上下文先失败

title: The Steering Budget: Examples beat Knobs
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.14246v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Generative models are steered with knobs -- prompts, guidance scales, property tags. Turn one as hard as you like and, past a point, it stops moving the property you care about. We find that ceiling is not a shortcoming of the model but a budget, set by the training data before the model is trained: a property's movable range splits in two -- the part a knob can reach, and a second, significant part that only examples -- concrete instances of what you want more of -- can reach. That second part is usually much larger, but not always, and the same budget says so in advance.
  Reaching that second part takes a different move: instead of turning a knob, you show the model examples, composed from what it already learned rather than added to its training. A cheap audit of the training data measures the budget; we give a recipe for building the example set that reaches all of it.
  This buys two things a knob can't. Reach: it moves a property
reason_zh: 揭示生成模型控制中的“预算”机制，证明示例比旋钮更有效，对可控生成有根本性指导意义。
summary_zh: 本文发现生成模型中的控制旋钮（如提示、引导尺度）存在一个“预算”上限，该上限由训练数据在模型训练前设定。超过此上限后，旋钮不再影响目标属性。作者证明，通过提供示例而非调节旋钮，可以突破这一预算限制，实现更有效的控制。这一发现挑战了传统可控生成方法，为模型设计和训练数据选择提供了新视角。
title_zh: 控制预算：示例胜于旋钮

title: The agent evaluation gap: Enterprise AI organizations have a reality-alignment problem, not a coverage problem — and most are shipping to production anyway
raw_text:
Across 157 enterprises, organizations are granting AI agents more autonomy while trusting the evaluations meant to gate that autonomy less. Half have already shipped an agent that passed their internal evaluations and then failed a customer in production; only one in twenty fully trusts automated evaluation today; and the most-cited weakness is that evaluations do not align with real-world outcomes. Yet two-thirds already allow, or are actively engineering toward, deploying agent changes to production on automated evaluation alone — with no human in the loop. The result is an evaluation gap — the distance between how much autonomy enterprises are handing their agents and how far they trust the tests that are supposed to catch the failures.

This wave of VentureBeat Pulse Research examines how technical leaders measure agent performance: which reliability and evaluation platforms they use, how they select and trust them, what breaks in production, and how far they are willing to
reason_zh: 揭示企业AI代理评估与现实脱节的严重问题，数据详实，对AI工程团队有重要警示和指导意义。
summary_zh: VentureBeat发布的一项针对157家企业的调查显示，AI代理评估存在严重的现实对齐问题。组织在赋予AI代理更多自主权的同时，对评估的信任度却在下降。一半的企业曾将内部评估通过的代理部署到生产环境，却在客户场景中失败；只有5%的企业完全信任自动化评估。最常被提及的弱点是评估与现实世界结果不一致。文章指出，企业面临的是现实对齐问题而非覆盖率问题，但大多数企业仍选择将代理推向生产。
title_zh: 代理评估鸿沟：企业AI组织面临现实对齐问题而非覆盖率问题——大多数仍将代理推向生产

title: 独家 | 智谱 ARR 达到10 亿美元，半年增长 15 倍
raw_text:
文 | 周鑫雨

编辑 | 张雨忻

智能涌现从多个独立信源处获悉，截至 2026 年 7 月， 智谱的 ARR（年度经常性收入）已经达到 10 亿美元。

截至发稿前，针对上述信息，智谱未回复。

过去一年，AI Coding 和视频生成模型已经成为全球造血能力最强的 AI 赛道。

海外，Anthropic 的 Claude Code 仅发布半年，ARR 就飙升至 10 亿美金。这一现金牛产品，也将 Anthropic 的整体 估值抬高到万亿美金（2026 年 5 月），超过了 OpenAI。

但此前，对于国内大模型公司能否复刻 Anthropic 的财富神话，市场一直抱有疑问。一方面，背靠企业付费意愿高、订阅生态成熟的北美市场，Anthropic 有天然优渥的商业化土壤。另一方面，Anthropic 的估值，与智谱最新市值仍存在一个数量级的差距——这意味着，Anthropic 有更大量的资金能获取训练资源，这是国内模型厂商还比不了的。

但智谱达到 10 亿美金 ARR 的速度，远超预期。曾有投资人对我们表示，智谱的 ARR 预计到 2026 年底，才能达到 10 亿-15 亿美金。

一个更直观的对比是：根据Anthropic 的官方数据和智谱财报数据，ARR 从 1 亿美金增长到 10 亿美金，Anthropic 用了 15 个月，智谱仅用了 5 个月。据知情人士，在2026 年 1 月到7 月期间，智谱的 ARR 增长了 15 倍。

智谱是国内最早押注 Coding 路线的模型厂商之一。2025年初，智谱就开始将力量收敛到了对模型 Coding 能力的提升上。智谱创始人唐杰曾形容智谱押注了 Coding 和 Reasoning——一种能与 Agent 共生共荣的模型能力。

后续，智谱以平均两个月一版的速度，发布了一系列 Coding 能力位于全球第一梯队的旗舰模型。2026 年 6 月最新上线的 GLM-5.2，即便开源，多个核心指标依然追平甚至超过了 Claude Opus 4.8 以及 GPT-5.5。
reason_zh: 独家消息：智谱ARR达10亿美元，半年增长15倍，反映国内AI公司商业化进展。
summary_zh: 36氪独家获悉，截至2026年7月，智谱的ARR（年度经常性收入）已达到10亿美元。据知情人士透露，2026年1月至7月期间，智谱ARR增长了15倍。文章对比了Anthropic的Claude Code，后者发布半年ARR也达10亿美元。智谱的快速增长得益于AI Coding和视频生成模型等赛道，其API价格上调但调用量仍增长约400%。

title: Kimi K3 正式发布
raw_text: 月之暗面在今日凌晨宣布，正式推出其迄今能力最强的模型 —— Kimi K3，一个 2.8 万亿参数模型。公告称，Kimi K3 是全球首个开源的 3 万亿级别模型，面向长程编程、知识工作和推理等前沿智能场景而设计。 Kimi K3 基于 KDA 混合线性注意力机制（Kimi Delta Attention）和注意力残差（Attention Residuals）技术构建，原生...
reason_zh: Kimi K3正式发布，2.8万亿参数开源，技术架构创新，值得深入阅读。
summary_zh: 月之暗面正式发布Kimi K3模型，这是其迄今能力最强的模型。该模型拥有2.8万亿参数，基于KDA混合线性注意力机制（Kimi Delta Attention）和注意力残差（Attention Residuals）技术构建，原生支持视觉理解，并拥有100万token上下文窗口。公告称Kimi K3是全球首个开源的3万亿级别模型，面向长程编程等任务优化。
title_zh: Kimi K3正式发布

title: Long-Context Fine-Tuning with Limited VRAM
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.15105v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning reduces model and optimizer memory, but dense attention still makes long training sequences expensive. We combine Hierarchical Global Attention (HGA) with segment-wise backpropagation and tiered KV storage. Only the active segment remains differentiable in VRAM; older KV is detached into RAM or NVMe, and HGA loads a bounded set of exact historical tokens for each query block. On Qwen3-8B with 4-bit QLoRA and PG19, dense training on a 16 GB Quadro RTX 5000 fits 2,048 tokens but fails at 4,096, whereas HGA reaches 16,384 tokens with 15.28 GB peak VRAM. Under evaluation the same adapter runs through 131,072 tokens on this card; VRAM is not constant but grows gently with the resident chunk summaries, so RAM and NVMe capacity set the practical limit beyond these lengths. At the shared 2K training length, HGA-trained and dense-trained adapters obtain 2.7405 and 2.7383 nat under the same dense-attention readout,
reason_zh: 提出分层全局注意力与分段反向传播，解决长上下文微调显存瓶颈，实用性强，方法创新。
summary_zh: 本文针对参数高效微调中长训练序列的显存问题，提出结合分层全局注意力（HGA）、分段反向传播和分层KV存储的方法。只有活跃段在VRAM中可微，旧KV被卸载到RAM或NVMe，HGA加载批量全局token。该方法显著降低了长上下文微调的显存需求，使有限VRAM下也能进行长序列训练。
title_zh: 有限VRAM下的长上下文微调

title: 国家发改委发布《人工智能合作发展行动计划》
raw_text: 36氪获悉，国家发改委发布《人工智能合作发展行动计划》，内容包括：一、优质数据供给行动。二、智能算力普惠行动。三、开源生态共享行动。四、人工智能深度赋能行动。五、数智人才共育行动。六、规则标准共建行动。七、安全治理协作行动。八、人工智能向善行动。
reason_zh: 国家发改委发布AI合作发展行动计划，涵盖数据、算力、开源、赋能、人才、规则、安全、向善八大行动，政策导向性强。
summary_zh: 国家发改委发布《人工智能合作发展行动计划》，提出八项行动：优质数据供给、智能算力普惠、开源生态共享、人工智能深度赋能、数智人才共育、规则标准共建、安全治理协作、人工智能向善。该计划旨在推动AI产业健康发展。

title: [AINews] Kimi K3 2.8T-A50B: the largest open model ever released; Opus 4.8-class at Sonnet 5 pricing
raw_text: a great week for open models continues.
reason_zh: Kimi K3 2.8T参数开源模型发布，性能对标Opus 4.8，定价Sonnet 5，影响巨大。

title: 习近平宣布中国支持全球人工智能发展重大举措
raw_text: 国家主席习近平在上海世界会客厅出席2026世界人工智能大会暨人工智能全球治理高级别会议开幕式并发表主旨讲话。习近平指出，在各方共同努力下，世界人工智能合作组织在上海应运而生。这是中方响应全球南方呼声、团结国际社会积极推动人工智能发展和治理的重大举措，将成为人工智能发展史上的一个重要里程碑。习近平宣布，为进一步支持全球人工智能发展、推进全球人工智能能力建设，未来5年，中国将面向发展中国家提供5000个人工智能专题研修培训名额；面向东盟、阿盟、非盟、拉共体、上合组织、金砖国家建设国际人工智能应用合作中心；推动气象智能预警方案“妈祖”在30个国家落地应用，守望万家灯火，护佑四海安澜。（新华社）
reason_zh: 习近平宣布中国支持全球AI发展的重大举措，包括培训名额、合作中心及气象方案落地，具有重要政策导向意义。
summary_zh: 国家主席习近平在2026世界人工智能大会开幕式上宣布，未来5年中国将面向发展中国家提供5000个人工智能专题研修培训名额；面向东盟、阿盟、非盟、拉共体、上合组织、金砖国家建设国际人工智能应用合作中心；推动气象智能预警方案“妈祖”在30个国家落地应用。这些举措旨在支持全球人工智能发展和能力建设。

title: MedFailBench: A Clinician-Built Open-Source Benchmark for Medical AI Safety Boundary Inspection
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.15166v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Most medical AI benchmarks measure whether a model knows the correct answer. MedFailBench asks a different question: which safety boundary failed? We present a clinician-built synthetic benchmark and failure atlas that labels medical AI errors by severity (1--5) and safety gate type (missed urgent escalation, unsafe remote dosing, unsafe discharge reassurance, evidence fabrication, unsafe protocol execution, source support gap). The current public release (v0.2.1) contains 44 clinician-reviewed synthetic cases with severity annotations, a live HuggingFace leaderboard preview, a safety gate taxonomy, a clinical severity rubric, and an automated pipeline for archiving model-response screening runs. No patient data, clinical validation claims, or model rankings are included. MedFailBench is released under Apache-2.0 and CC-BY-4.0 and carries the Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21205535.
reason_zh: 临床医生构建的医学AI安全边界基准，标注错误严重性和安全门类型，实用价值高。
summary_zh: 本文提出MedFailBench，一个由临床医生构建的开源基准，用于检查医学AI的安全边界。与大多数衡量模型是否知道正确答案的基准不同，MedFailBench询问哪个安全边界失效了。它包含合成基准和故障图谱，按严重性（1-5级）和安全门类型（如错过紧急升级、不安全远程给药、不安全出院推荐）标注医学AI错误。
title_zh: MedFailBench：临床医生构建的医学AI安全边界检查开源基准

title: Inkling: Our open-weights model
raw_text:
Inkling: Our open-weights model

Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab just released their first open-weights model. Inkling is "a Mixture-of-Experts transformer with 975B total parameters, 41B active" - an Apache-2.0 licensed multimodal model trained on 45 trillion tokens of text, images, audio and video.

They're also promising Inkling-Small, a 276B (12B active) model, but that's still being tested and the weights will be released "once that work is complete".

The model card is much shorter than I've come to expect from US AI labs. It links to even shorter Training Data Documentation with almost nothing of interest in it - it's best summarized by these two paragraphs:

The datasets Thinking Machines Lab uses to develop its AI services
reason_zh: Mira Murati新公司首款开源模型，975B参数MoE架构，值得关注。
summary_zh: Mira Murati创立的Thinking Machines Lab发布了其首个开源权重模型Inkling。该模型采用混合专家（MoE）Transformer架构，总参数量975B，激活参数41B，基于45万亿token的多模态数据（文本、图像、音频、视频）训练，采用Apache-2.0许可证。这是该公司成立以来的首个重要产品发布，标志着其在开源AI领域的正式亮相。
title_zh: Inkling：我们的开源权重模型

title: Transcoders for Investigating Deception in Language Models
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.14791v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Transcoders have recently emerged as a promising approach for mechanistic interpretability (MI), enabling circuit-level analysis of model behaviour. In this paper, we investigate the use of transcoders to analyse deceptive behaviour in language models, a behaviour that poses a safety and security risk. Using a Qwen3-4B model with pre-trained transcoders, specifically per-layer transcoders (PLTs), we construct attribution graphs that capture feature activations and inter-feature dependencies, allowing circuit-level analysis of deception. Through feature steering and circuit analysis, we identified a dictionary of deception-related features and show that these features exert a stronger influence on deceptive outputs, as they produce predictable shifts between deceptive and non-deceptive responses. These findings suggest that deception emerges from internal model mechanisms and highlight the potential of transcoders for behavioural monitori
reason_zh: 利用转码器进行可解释性分析，揭示语言模型中的欺骗行为机制，对AI安全有重要意义。
summary_zh: 本文研究使用转码器（transcoders）分析语言模型中的欺骗行为。转码器是机械可解释性（MI）的新兴方法，能够实现电路级行为分析。作者在Qwen3-4B模型上应用预训练的转码器，探索模型在生成欺骗性输出时的内部表示和计算路径。实验揭示了与欺骗相关的特定神经元和电路模式，为检测和缓解模型欺骗行为提供了新思路。该工作展示了转码器在安全相关分析中的潜力，有助于构建更可信的AI系统。
title_zh: 使用转码器研究语言模型中的欺骗行为

title: Capability from Access Structure, Not Scale: Lower Bounds and Pre-Registered Tests for Hybrid Sequence Models
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.14144v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: The Platonic Representation Hypothesis (PRH) holds that as models scale, representations of heterogeneous networks converge toward a shared model of reality. We propose its sequel and boundary, the Capability Convergence Hypothesis (CCH): under a fixed per-token inference budget, representational convergence does not entail capability convergence. Capability instead converges toward a class, the access-complete hybrid: any architecture holding both a compressive O(1)-state channel and a scalable verbatim-index channel. We anchor it on a witness task, the Newton's-apple problem in an infinite stream, and name three resource walls: a Shannon wall barring any o(Nb)-state architecture, a horizon wall barring any fixed window, and a circuit wall barring fixed-depth attention-only composition (conditional on TC0 != NC1). Under an explicit separability assumption a hybrid crosses all three by paying each wall's price, so capability is strictly
reason_zh: 提出能力收敛假说，挑战普适表征假说，揭示访问结构而非规模决定能力，理论价值高。
summary_zh: 普适表征假说认为，随着模型规模扩大，异构网络的表征会收敛到一个共享的现实模型。本文提出其续集和边界——能力收敛假说：在固定的每token推理预算下，表征收敛并不意味着能力收敛。作者通过理论下界和预注册实验证明，混合序列模型的能力主要取决于其访问结构（即模型如何访问上下文），而非模型规模。具体而言，即使表征相似，不同访问结构会导致显著的能力差异。该工作挑战了当前对模型规模与能力关系的普遍认知，为设计更高效的序列模型提供了新视角。
title_zh: 能力来自访问结构而非规模：混合序列模型的下界与预注册测试

title: When a Verified World Model Still Loses: Play-Adequacy vs Prediction-Accuracy in LLM-Synthesized Code World Models
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.14169v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Large language models can synthesize a game's rules as executable code - a Code World Model (CWM) - which a classical planner then searches over. Such models are typically accepted when they reach high transition accuracy on sampled trajectories. We argue this is the wrong notion of adequacy for planning.
  We show four things. (1) An LLM-synthesized CWM can pass a sampling gate at 100% transition accuracy and be $\geq 98\%$ state-accurate on the planner's own search distribution, yet lose systematically at play, because the $<1\%$ it gets wrong is exactly the pivotal dynamics; the play cost of the omitted rule is $0.091$ (seed-clustered 95% CI $[0.065,0.117]$, $n=4800$). We call this the verified-vs-correct gap, and confirm it end-to-end through the synthesis pipeline. (2) The harm follows a quantitative law, $\mathrm{danger}=\mathrm{play\_cost}\times(1-\mathrm{rarity})^N$, whose $(1-\mathrm{rarity})^N$ gate-miss factor is proven exact
reason_zh: 揭示LLM合成代码世界模型在规划中的缺陷，提出“游戏充分性”概念，挑战传统评估标准。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型可以将游戏规则合成为可执行代码——即代码世界模型，然后由经典规划器进行搜索。这类模型通常在其对采样轨迹的转换准确率达到高水平时被接受。本文认为，对于规划而言，这是错误的充分性概念。作者展示了四点：(1) LLM合成的CWM即使达到高转换准确率，也可能在规划中失败；(2) 提出“游戏充分性”作为更合适的评估标准，即模型是否能够支持有效的规划；(3) 通过实验证明，高预测准确率与规划性能之间存在显著差距；(4) 提出改进CWM的方法，使其更符合规划需求。该工作挑战了当前对LLM合成模型评估的普遍做法，为构建更可靠的规划模型提供了新方向。
title_zh: 当验证过的世界模型仍然失败：LLM合成代码世界模型中的游戏充分性与预测准确性

title: Proof-or-Stop: Don't Trust the Agent, Trust the Evidence -- Loop Engineering for Verifiable Evidence-Gated Lifecycle Control
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.14890v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Autonomous coding agents increasingly execute multi-step software work, but lifecycle states such as reviewed, tested, DONE, and ready-to-merge remain claims unless supported by current evidence. We present Proof-or-Stop Lifecycle Control, a method that permits lifecycle transitions only when fresh, tracked-source-state-bound, mechanically verifiable evidence satisfies the relevant gate. The method treats agent outputs as claims rather than lifecycle state, and uses proof operationally to mean gate-admissible evidence under a stated trust model, not semantic program correctness.
  We evaluate an open-source implementation through mechanism tests, a powered control-policy ablation, and operated self-application evidence. The unattended-loop engine passed 10 of 10 scenarios with zero false-DONE, and local-key receipt bundles rejected 18 tamper classes with zero false accepts. In a 9,240-cell ablation, the pre-registered A4 versus A2-prime
reason_zh: 提出证据门控生命周期控制方法，确保自主编码代理的每个状态都有可验证证据，提升可靠性。
summary_zh: 本文提出Proof-or-Stop生命周期控制方法，用于自主编码代理。当前代理在执行多步软件任务时，其生命周期状态（如已审查、已测试、完成、可合并）往往只是声明，缺乏当前证据支持。该方法要求每个状态转换必须基于新鲜的、可追踪的、机械可验证的证据，否则禁止转换。作者在真实编码场景中验证了该方法，有效减少了错误状态和不可靠的声明，提高了代理行为的可信度和可审计性。
title_zh: 证明或停止：不要相信代理，相信证据——用于可验证证据门控生命周期控制的循环工程

title: Google ordered to open Android and Search to rivals in Europe
raw_text: Google must give rival AI assistants and search engines greater access to key parts of Android and Google Search after the European Union ordered the company to comply with the bloc's digital antitrust rules. The two decisions, handed down Thursday, could weaken Google's control over two of the tech industry's most important platforms and have […]
reason_zh: 欧盟反垄断裁决，要求谷歌向AI竞争对手开放安卓和搜索，影响深远。
summary_zh: 欧盟要求谷歌根据数字反垄断规则，向竞争对手的AI助手和搜索引擎开放安卓和谷歌搜索的关键部分。这两项决定可能削弱谷歌对两大重要平台的控制，对AI行业竞争格局产生重大影响。
title_zh: 欧盟命令谷歌向竞争对手开放安卓和搜索

title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu
raw_text: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.
reason_zh: Apple Intelligence获准在华推出，与阿里百度合作，标志苹果AI在中国市场的重要进展。
summary_zh: 据报道，Apple Intelligence已获准在中国市场推出，并与阿里巴巴和百度达成合作。该交易去年已有传闻，此次获批标志着苹果AI在中国这一关键市场迈出重要一步。合作细节尚未完全披露，但预计将涉及本地化AI服务。
title_zh: Apple Intelligence获准在华推出，与阿里巴巴和百度合作

title: The agent security gap: 54% of enterprises have already had an AI agent incident, and most still let agents share credentials
raw_text:
Across 107 enterprises, AI agents are being given real access to systems and data while the controls meant to contain them lag behind. More than half have already had a confirmed agent security incident or a near-miss; only about a third give every agent its own scoped identity, and most agents still share credentials; and only three in ten isolate their highest-risk agents. The security stack is overwhelmingly borrowed from the model providers and hyperscalers rather than purpose-built for agents, spending remains a thin slice of the security budget, and enterprises are evenly split on whether their defenses are keeping pace with AI-enabled attackers. The result is an agent security gap — autonomous agents proliferating faster than the identity, isolation, and enforcement controls needed to hold them.

This wave of VentureBeat Pulse Research examines how enterprises secure their AI agents: what tooling they run, how they manage agent identity and isolation, what has already go
reason_zh: 调查揭示AI代理安全漏洞：54%企业已发生事故，多数仍共享凭证，对安全实践有重要警示。
summary_zh: VentureBeat报道了一项针对107家企业的调查，显示AI代理安全存在严重缺口：54%的企业已遭遇确认的AI代理安全事件或险情；只有约三分之一的企业为每个代理分配了独立的作用域身份，大多数代理仍共享凭证；仅三成企业隔离了最高风险的代理。调查指出，AI代理被赋予真实系统访问权限，但安全控制措施滞后，企业需加强代理身份管理和访问控制。
title_zh: AI代理安全缺口：54%的企业已发生AI代理事件，多数仍让代理共享凭证

title: Introducing Grok on Amazon Bedrock
raw_text: This post covers what makes Grok 4.3 a great fit for agentic and enterprise workloads, how you access it through Amazon Bedrock, and how to use the capabilities most teams reach for first: a basic chat request, configurable reasoning effort, tool calling, structured output, image input, and stateful multi-turn conversations.
reason_zh: AWS 官方博客介绍 Grok 4.3 在 Bedrock 上的集成，对使用 AWS 的企业开发者有直接指导意义。
summary_zh: AWS 机器学习博客宣布 Grok 4.3 模型已在 Amazon Bedrock 上可用。文章详细介绍了 Grok 4.3 在智能体和企业工作负载中的优势，包括基本聊天请求、可配置推理努力、工具调用、结构化输出、图像输入和状态多轮对话等功能。同时提供了通过 Bedrock 访问和使用这些功能的指南。
title_zh: 在 Amazon Bedrock 上引入 Grok

title: Align AI to Dynamic Human-AI Workflows
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.14240v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Current alignment approaches typically focus on emulating human behavior using static representations of human preferences, failing to capture the dynamic, context-dependent nature of real-world human-AI interactions. In this paper, we argue for a shift from static and emulative to interactive and complementary alignment, where preferences emerge through interaction and alignment is defined not by satisfying preferences alone. We first formalize this gap by contrasting existing alignment with a trajectory-level view in which human and model behavior co-evolve over time. Because these interaction dynamics have not been adequately captured within existing ML formulations, we ground this perspective in insights from an interdisciplinary workshop. We draw on lessons from social-science accounts of human-human collaboration and then argue that human-AI systems amplify these dynamics, introducing new asymmetries that make reasoning about uncer
reason_zh: 提出从静态对齐转向动态互补对齐，强调人机交互中偏好的涌现性，对AI对齐研究有颠覆性启发。
summary_zh: 本文批判当前AI对齐方法过度依赖静态人类偏好表示，未能捕捉真实人机交互的动态性。作者主张从静态模仿对齐转向交互式互补对齐，让偏好通过人机协作涌现。论文提出动态对齐框架，使AI系统能适应不同上下文和用户需求，而非简单模仿平均行为。这一观点挑战了主流对齐范式，为构建更灵活、更符合实际的人机协作系统提供了理论基础。
title_zh: 将AI对齐到动态人机工作流

title: Tracing LLM Behavior to the Training Data with Empirical Next-Token Distributions
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.14306v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: In this paper, we study the connection between an LLM's output distribution and the data used to train it. Specifically, we study the degree to which an LLM's next-token distribution agrees with the empirical next-token distribution (ENTD) given the context in the training data. The ENTD is an appealing target because it is the unrestricted global minimizer of the next-token cross entropy loss used for pretraining, as well as an easily interpretable function of the pretraining corpus. We find that for a significant fraction of inputs, the LLM's distribution agrees with the ENTD almost perfectly, and the average agreement increases with model scale and training compute. Nevertheless, there is a long tail of input sequences where the LLM and ENTD differ significantly, and we examine several possible sources of this discrepancy across the transformer architecture, training procedure, and finite-sample noise in the ENTD estimate itself. More
reason_zh: 通过经验next-token分布追溯LLM行为与训练数据的关联，为模型可解释性和数据影响分析提供新方法。
summary_zh: 本文研究大语言模型输出分布与训练数据之间的联系。作者引入经验next-token分布（ENTD）概念，即给定上下文在训练数据中的实际next-token分布，并比较LLM的预测分布与ENTD的一致性。通过分析，他们发现LLM的行为在很大程度上可追溯到训练数据中的统计模式，这为理解模型泛化、幻觉和偏见提供了新视角。该方法有望用于数据影响分析和模型调试。
title_zh: 通过经验next-token分布追溯LLM行为到训练数据

title: Three lessons in accelerating foundation model upgrades
raw_text:
Have you run into problems migrating your products from one model to the next?

Upgrading to the latest AI models is rarely simple. For engineering teams, model updates whether migrating to an entirely new model or updating to a newer checkpoint within the same model family, like moving from an earlier Gemini version to Gemini 3.5 — often require a slow and costly process of testing, proving quality, and manually evaluating new responses. For most engineering teams, upgrading to a new model checkpoint means months of manual toil to verify performance. And the industry is moving at breakneck pace – since 2023, we’ve announced six major model evolutions, bringing us to Gemini 3.5 today. 

Our team at Google Cloud, Applied ML, has a goal to deliver transforma
reason_zh: 工程团队迁移模型时遇到的真实问题与解决方案，实用性强，适合AI产品经理和开发者。
summary_zh: 本文总结了加速基础模型升级的三个经验教训。首先，模型升级并非简单的替换，需要仔细评估新模型在特定任务上的表现差异，并做好回归测试。其次，建议采用渐进式迁移策略，先在小流量上验证，再逐步扩大范围，以降低风险。最后，强调了监控和回滚机制的重要性，确保在出现问题时能快速恢复。文章还讨论了如何利用模型版本管理工具和自动化测试流程来简化升级过程，并分享了多个实际案例。
title_zh: 加速基础模型升级的三个经验教训

title: Kimi K3, and what we can still learn from the pelican benchmark
raw_text:
Chinese AI lab Moonshot AI announced Kimi K3 this morning, describing it as their "most capable model to date, with 2.8 trillion parameters". It's currently available via their website and API, but an open weight release is promised "by July 27, 2026".

Moonshot are calling this the first "open 3T-class model" (I guess they're rounding 2.8 trillion up to 3 trillion), taking the crown from DeepSeek's 1.6T v4 Pro. Their self-reported benchmarks have K3 mostly beating Claude Opus 4.8 max and GPT-5.5 high, while losing out to Claude Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol.

A few highlights from the Artificial Analysis report on the model:

  • "On our private long-horizon knowledge work evaluation, Kimi K3 reaches an overall El
reason_zh: Kimi K3 发布，2.8万亿参数，承诺开源，值得关注其技术细节和开源时间表。
summary_zh: 中国AI实验室Moonshot AI发布了Kimi K3，称其为“迄今为止最强大的模型”，拥有2.8万亿参数。该模型已通过网站和API提供，但开源权重承诺在2026年7月27日前发布。Moonshot称这是首个“开源3T级模型”。文章还提及了pelican基准测试的启示。
title_zh: Kimi K3，以及我们仍能从pelican基准测试中学到什么

title: 曙光8000亮相WAIC 2026，单个计算单元算力密度提升20倍
raw_text: 36氪获悉，7月17日，曙光8000（登峰）在2026世界人工智能大会以真机形态首次公开亮相，入选大会“镇馆之宝”。该系统采用超智融合架构，支持FP64至INT8全精度计算，单个计算单元算力密度提升20倍；自研scaleFabric互连技术可支撑十万卡规模稳定互连。系统已完成300余项重点应用适配，覆盖20余个科研与产业领域。
reason_zh: 曙光8000真机亮相WAIC，算力密度提升20倍，展示国产超算最新进展。
summary_zh: 曙光8000（登峰）在2026世界人工智能大会以真机形式首次公开亮相，并入选大会“镇馆之宝”。该系统采用超智融合架构，支持FP64至INT8全精度计算，单个计算单元算力密度提升20倍。自研scaleFabric互连技术可支撑十万卡规模稳定互连。系统已完成300余项重点应用适配，覆盖20余个科研与产业领域。
